captions.formal: Motion-blurred vehicles stream through a sunlit urban intersection framed by yellow autumn trees and high-rise apartments, with signage for Korea Tectes Engineering visible on a building to the left.
captions.sarcastic: Witness the breathtaking spectacle of cars driving through an intersection, accelerated so you don't have to waste your precious life watching paint dry.
captions.humorous_tech: The intersection is handling peak traffic load with zero latency while the autumn trees provide a vibrant UI refresh.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The city traffic moves so fast the cars have officially blurred into streaks of pure anxiety.

captions.formal: A small ginger kitten walks forward beneath low-hanging branches in a sun-dappled outdoor area, its fur highlighted by bright natural light filtering through dense green foliage.
captions.sarcastic: Witness the sheer audacity of a ginger kitten executing the radical maneuver of walking forward.
captions.humorous_tech: This ginger kitten is deploying to production with the cautious, step-by-step gait of an engineer who just broke the build and is afraid to touch anything else.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This ginger kitten is walking with the deliberate confidence of someone who just remembered they left the stove on.

captions.formal: A woman in a beige jacket and orange top types on a white keyboard at a glass-walled office desk, her attention fixed on the silver desktop monitor before her.
captions.sarcastic: Witness the sheer audacity of a woman typing on a keyboard in an office, a radical act of productivity that surely defies the laws of physics.
captions.humorous_tech: She is refactoring her life while the tangled wires on the desk serve as a physical reminder of the technical debt she is ignoring.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She is typing with the intense focus of someone trying to remember if they actually locked the front door.
